title: Create  Vmoon
description: Create Vmoon is a  Create based modpack to play with your friends. It contains many ways of traveling, Building, and exploring features to never get bored.
body:
## make sure to download the release versions, the beta versions are for servers

Create Vmoon is a Modpack based around the create mod, it's equally ballanced and easy to understand.

We added some unique custom coded items that no other modpack has. 
For more details look at the spoiler
       \/
       \/

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

We added a new custom material for armor and tools, a new accessory and a Charcoal block

</details>



  -There are endless possibilities with Create Vmoon-
